prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms) at the DFT level using the tier 'standard' preset — B3LYP/def2-TZVP — in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet). Exact four-centre integrals were used (no density fitting). The geometry was taken from the user-supplied .xyz file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz and was not re-optimised at this level (single-point). The SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported. The engine integrity check returned status: ok, trustworthy: true. HOMO (index 24) = −5.553772 eV; LUMO (index 25) = −0.2489544 eV; HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV (headline result). Koopmans-derived vertical IP = 5.5538 eV, vertical EA = 0.24895 eV, chemical hardness η = 2.6524 eV, electronegativity χ = 2.9014 eV, electrophilicity index ω = 1.5868 eV. Total electronic energy = −287.71578 Hartree. Result JSON written to aniline_frontier_dft.json. CLI: cli.py frontier aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
